case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FUENTES-DEGRIVALVA, ADRIANA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES-DEGRIVALVA, ADRIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES-DEGRIVALVA, ADRIANA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-04-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-02-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-08-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL OF $5025.87. DEFT TO PAY $2500 ON 6/7/04 BY CASHIER'S CHECK. IF NO APPEARANCE ON 12/8/04 @ 1:30 PM, CASE CONT'D FOR 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF, AT
EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-18-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES-DEGRIVALVA, ADRIANA NO APPEARANCES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJ. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150 PER MONTH BEG. ON JULY 15, 2004 & ON THE 15TH DAY OF
